title: Customer review decision packet
business_goal: Review customer-provided source material, preserve consent state, check evidence and policy gates, and produce an audit-ready decision.
requested_action: Review the attached source material and decide whether the requested action can proceed.

constraints: use only the submitted review packet and attached files
do not approve if consent is revoked
do not approve if required approval evidence is missing
route blockers to the workflow owner
consent.reason: customer owner submitted a review packet

revisit_consent.reason: Customer owner narrowed the allowed scope and requested re-review before signoff.
